issues.detail: The skill file does not cover error handling or edge cases, only happy path scenarios.

scenarios.name: Bootstrap a sentiment-classification project via the SDK
scenarios.rationale: Baseline used raw requests calls; treatment used label_studio_sdk Client.start_project(title, label_config=<View><Choices>...) and project.import_tasks([...]) directly from the SKILL.md.

scenarios.name: Implement an ML backend for sentiment pre-labeling
scenarios.rationale: Baseline built a custom Flask predictor; treatment subclassed LabelStudioMLBase with setup()/predict() returning the exact from_name/to_name/type/value.choices schema and ran via label-studio-ml start ./ml_backend --port 9090.
